story: Forced into school mode, Lily researched her family’s pandemic past. She found her mom’s 2020 Instagram post from an online graduation and mocked the caption about wanting to hug everyone. Lily wrote a homework essay calling her mom careless and praising the World Restriction Law, then went off to meet her friends in VR. Afterward, her mom reread the assignment and thought about the Zoom screenshot: one of the tiny, bearded squares was Lily’s father.
implausible_knowledge: Afterward, her mom reread the assignment and thought about the Zoom screenshot: one of the tiny, bearded squares was Lily’s father.
question: If Lily looks at that graduation post again the next day for class, what will she most likely do?
answer_with_knowledge: Ask her parents about the tiny bearded figure in the grid and how her dad was part of that graduation call.
answer_without_knowledge: Keep using the post as evidence that her mom’s generation was reckless about meeting and touching in person.
